files.00_Overview.md: Strong foundation but lacks 3W structure. Add: 'Learning Objectives' section after Overview, expand 'Key Takeaways' summary at end. The dimensionless numbers table is good but needs OpenFOAM context for each (when to use which solver). Remove Thai-English mixing - choose consistent language.
files.01_Flow_Regimes.md: Comprehensive but bloated. Contains excessive OpenFOAM code examples that distract from core concepts. Extract all code snippets to a separate 'Solver Configuration Guide' sidebar. Missing clear 'Why This Matters' motivation upfront. The Thai content is rich - either fully localize or keep English. No learning objectives visible. The flowchart at end is valuable but appears too late - move earlier as navigation aid.
files.02_Interfacial_Phenomena.md: Too brief compared to file 01. Lacks depth on critical topics like Marangoni effect (only 2 sentences). Missing 'When to Use What' decision guide. No OpenFOAM parameter tuning guidance. Dimensionless numbers repeated from 00_Overview.md - consolidate into one reference table across files. Interface tracking methods comparison is good but needs pros/cons specific to OpenFOAM solvers.

global_strategy: Apply consistent 3W framework: Start each file with 'Why This Matters for OpenFOAM' motivation, followed by clear Learning Objectives. Eliminate redundancy - dimensionless numbers appear in 3 places, consolidate into shared reference. Extract all code snippets into dedicated 'OpenFOAM Implementation' callout boxes to keep conceptual flow clean. Files show inconsistent depth (01 is 394 lines, 02 is 212 lines) - balance coverage. Consider splitting 01 into two files: 'Flow_Regime_Theory.md' and 'Flow_Regime_Solver_Selection.md'
